title: MODEL CAR detail page » CAR MODEL VARIANT
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the MODEL CAR detail page to show the connected CAR MODEL VARIANT
So I can ...
description:
* The MODEL CAR detail page is extended to contain a section for the connected CAR MODEL VARIANT.
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT is presented with its name and primary information.
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT contains a link to its detail page.
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no CAR MODEL VARIANT connected to the MODEL CAR then the section is not displayed at all.
